generated_oml:
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted on motor shaft for measuring rotational position"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance GearboxEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder mounted behind cycloidal gearbox for measuring output position"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring input current I_M to permanent magnet synchronous motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentSensorDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance GearboxEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoder
]

instance CurrentSensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data of motor shaft angular position"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MathWorksMATLABSimulink, SiemensSINUMERIK840DslCNCController
]

instance GearboxPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data of gearbox output angular position"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MathWorksMATLABSimulink
]

instance CurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data of input current I_M to motor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentSensorDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MathWorksMATLABSimulink, SiemensSINUMERIK840DslCNCController
]

instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data of output torque τ_M from motor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentSensorDataTransmitted, MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MathWorksMATLABSimulink
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data of angular velocity derived from motor position"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MathWorksMATLABSimulink
]

instance SysML_BDD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for system structure"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingTools
]

instance SysML_IBD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for system connections"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingTools
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coulomb-Viscous friction model implemented in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MathWorksMATLABSimulink
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction model implemented in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MathWorksMATLABSimulink
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction model implemented in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MathWorksMATLABSimulink
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction model implemented in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MathWorksMATLABSimulink
]

instance AAS_DataLinking : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for data linking and interoperability"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AssetAdministrationShellsAAS
]

instance DigitalShadowReferenceModelDSRM : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Digital Shadow Reference Model concretized for friction detection use case"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingTools
]

instance SiemensSINUMERIK840DslCNCController : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for motor control"
    DTDFVocab:enables MotionAccuracyImprovementService
]

instance MathWorksMATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink for simulation modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance SysMLModelingTools : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML modeling tools for structural system modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationDashboardService
]

instance MQTTProtocol : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time data streaming"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShellsAAS : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells for data linking and interoperability"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationDashboardService
]

instance DashboardVisualizationSoftware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization software for data traceability"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationDashboardService
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of joint friction using white-box and black-box models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionModelParametersInsight
]

instance VisualizationDashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrated visualization dashboard for data traceability"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataTraceabilityInsight
]

instance MotionAccuracyImprovementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Motion accuracy improvement through dynamic friction model exchange"
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionAccuracyImprovementAction
]

instance FrictionModelParametersInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Friction model parameters derived from data comparison used to adjust robot control algorithms for improved motion accuracy"
]

instance DataTraceabilityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data traceability through integrated visualization dashboard"
]

instance MotionAccuracyImprovementAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dynamic adjustment of robot control algorithms based on friction model parameters"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance MABIMAX100FirstAxis : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "First axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot with maximum working range ±90° and speed limit 75°/s"
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor controlled via Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SiemensSINUMERIK840DslCNCController
]

instance Gearwheel : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Gearwheel component in the first axis drive system"
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox in the first axis drive system"
]

instance RobotEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains MABIMAX100FirstAxis, PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, Gearwheel, CycloidalGearbox
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization via MQTT data streaming, with processing of live measurements for friction analysis during robot operation"
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Integration of physical robot components (motor, gearboxes, encoders), MQTT data streaming, processing components for friction model computation, and unified dashboard visualization linking engineering models with live data"
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Operational phase (as operated), using live sensor data during robot operation for continuous friction model refinement"
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation through comparison of simulated data against measured reference data to identify friction deviations and improve model accuracy"
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time data transmission from physical sensors to digital shadow"
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for industrial IoT standardization, SysML for model-based systems engineering"
]
